title: Masked Language Modeling
summary: A pretraining objective that involves predicting the masked tokens in a sentence. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Modeling. Start after Language Modeling and Masked Language Models. It opens into Masked Language Modeling (MLM) and Masked Language Modeling Enhancements.

panels.label: What it is

panels.label: What it is not

panels.label: Common confusion
panels.body: Ask whether the term changes tokenization, representation, retrieval, generation, or evaluation behavior. Compare it against Statistical Language Modeling and Masked Language Part so the boundary stays visible instead of collapsing into a synonym pile.

panels.label: Best next step
